## What

Short description of the change.

## Milestone

Which spec 2097 milestone and checklist item(s) this advances.

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds: `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] Tests pass: `./gradlew test`
- [ ] Style clean: `./gradlew ktlintCheck`
- [ ] Previews added for any new non-trivial composable
